story.text: As an AI, I need to move one atom to its goal state by reconciling over a durable file log, because bdo wants a workflow engine whose work survives any session death.

_note: This file is the atom's birth record and content-hash source. It is never mutated: current verdicts and state are always the fold over .ai-native/log/ (D-5). The verdicts block above records the state at authoring time only.
